name: Precious Shipping Public Company Limited
summary: Precious Shipping Public Company Limited owns and operates dry bulk ships on a tramp-shipping basis worldwide. It is involved in the chartering and technical management of ships. The company primarily handles cement, agricultural products, steel, fertilizers, ore and concentrates, coal, logs, and other item cargoes. As of December 31, 2019, it owned and operated 36 dry bulk ships, including 9 Supramax, 8 Ultramax, and 15 Handysize, including 4 cement carrier vessels with a total capacity of 1,585,805 deadweight tons. Precious Shipping Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
